text.title: Accessibility Annotation Pattern Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the component's interaction behaviour?

conclusion.verdict: use archetype=dialog snippet with focus_behaviour mandatory
extend the library deliberately or split the component

example.trace: search filter dropdown → behaviour=typeahead_with_listbox → archetype=combobox → snippet applied

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
